ddls:
CREATE TABLE "laureates" (
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the laureate */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the laureate */,
  "birth_city" TEXT /* City of birth */,
  "birth_country" TEXT /* Country of birth */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the laureate */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death (if applicable) */,
  "death_city" TEXT /* City of death (if applicable) */,
  "death_country" TEXT /* Country of death (if applicable) */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Country of citizenship */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Country of nationality */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the laureate */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the laureate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background */,
  "research_field" TEXT /* Primary research field */,
  "age_at_award" INTEGER /* Age of the laureate at the time of the award */,
  "is_living" INTEGER /* Indicates if the laureate is still alive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the prize was awarded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the prize (e.g., Chemistry, Peace) */,
  "prize" TEXT /* Official title of the prize */,
  "motivation" TEXT /* Motivation for awarding the prize */,
  "prize_share" TEXT /* Share of the prize awarded (e.g., 1/2, 1/1) */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the prize was awarded */,
  "award_ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location of the award ceremony */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Amount of prize money awarded */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the prize */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_prizes" (
  "laureate_prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate-prize association */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate who won the prize */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize awarded to the laureate */,
  "laureate_type" TEXT /* Type of laureate (e.g., Individual, Organization) */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the laureate to the prize-winning work */,
  "award_ceremony_attendance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the laureate attended the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_prizes_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_prizes_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organization_city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "organization_country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is located */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the organization's website */,
  "is_university" INTEGER /* Indicates if the organization is a university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_organizations" (
  "laureate_org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate-organization association */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated laureate */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated organization */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the laureate in the organization */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the laureate's association with the organization */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the laureate's association with the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_organizations_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_organizations_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* GDP of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender category (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of laureates for each gender */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistics are calculated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the prize (e.g., Chemistry, Literature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)
